Event: Lagoon Adventure
Event Date: 19/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E85
Tropical Splash

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the fighter drains life force from a random enemy fighter for 3 sec.
While draining life force, the enemy fighter deals 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% less damage and receives 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage. A maximum of 1 effects. Also, for 3 sec., the target cannot receive positive effects or restore health.

Enhancement: 2
2000 Magic damage from the gems
Every once in a while, the fighter draws life forces from 2 random enemy fighters for 4 seconds. While drawing life forces, enemy fighters deal 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% less damage and receive 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% damage. A maximum of 1 effects. Additionally, the targets receive 82300 / 117600 / 168000 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 / 450000 magical damage. Furthermore, for 4 seconds, they cannot receive positive effects or restore health.

Enhancement: 3
4000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while, the fighter draws life force from 3 random enemy fighters for 5 seconds. While drawing life force, enemy fighters deal 35% / 36% / 37% / 38% / 40% / 42% / 45% less damage and receive 35% / 36% / 37% / 38% / 40% / 42% / 45% more damage. A maximum of 1 effects. The targets also receive 94100 / 134400 / 192000 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 / 500000 magical damage. Additionally, the targets receive pure damage equal to 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 57% / 60% of the owner's magic power. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce incoming damage. Moreover, targets of the ability cannot receive positive effects or restore health for 5 seconds.
